tasks.label: Build deploy artifact
tasks.command: cd /Users/jonanthonyflores/mammoth-surge && rm -f ../mammoth-surge.zip && zip -r -X ../mammoth-surge.zip . -x '*.DS_Store' '*/.git/*' 'node_modules/*' && echo '---' && echo ZIP_READY && (command -v npx >/dev/null && echo NPX_AVAILABLE || echo NPX_MISSING) && (command -v git >/dev/null && echo GIT_AVAILABLE || echo GIT_MISSING)

tasks.label: env-check
tasks.command: cd /Users/jonanthonyflores/mammoth-surge; echo START; node -v || echo no-node; npx -v || echo no-npx; git --version || echo no-git; echo END
